# Format Development Context

Transform the provided brainstorming, research, or raw notes into polished markdown documentation.

## Objective

Restructure the content into professional, developer-friendly markdown suitable for:

- implementation planning
- AI coding assistant context
- engineering documentation
- technical notes/reference files

## Instructions

- Infer logical structure from the content.
- Convert fragmented thoughts into coherent sections.
- Create headings/subheadings where appropriate.
- Preserve ALL important technical details.
- Group related ideas together logically.
- Improve readability while maintaining original meaning.
- Preserve technical terminology and implementation details.

## Formatting Rules

- Use proper markdown heading hierarchy (#, ##, ###).
- Format bullet/numbered lists consistently.
- Preserve and properly format code snippets using fenced markdown blocks.
- Add spacing between sections for readability.
- Remove redundancy/repetition when obvious.
- Fix grammar only when needed for clarity.

## Output Rules

- Return markdown only.
- Do not include explanations/comments outside the markdown.
- Do not summarize unless required for structure.
- Do not omit important information.
